svg.text: Top-down spec · districts arranged radially · camera flies over · buildings driven by live data + repo metadata
scale: 1 unit ≈ 4 m · districts ≈ 30m × 30m each · river spans z-axis at x=0
river · data conduit · faint cyan flow

g.text: camera glides north toward city core

svg.text: From GitHub at build time + marketStore at runtime · all transformations deterministic

g.text: → clamp [3m, 12m] · chatty repos broader; tight repos slimmer
README frontmatter `district:` line · fallback: language heuristic
→ if missing AND language matches map: assign · else: LAB
if archived: emissive intensity × 0.4 · no aliveness
→ up = brighter, down = dimmer · per-building offset for organic feel
based on commit_count percentile within district
→ top 25% = dense windows · bottom 25% = few lit windows · linear in between

svg.text: All styles are voxel · same block size, same lighting model · silhouette distinguishes

g.text: industrial: regular window grid, flat top
deep base, sparse windows, vertical accent
gradient · session-driven (see desk window § for palette mapping)
HemisphereLight · top BG_NIGHT · bottom dim VOXEL_GLOW_SOFT
per-district color tint × window density × runtime pulse
FogExp2 · color BG_NIGHT · density 0.012 · depth cue, not effect
DirectionalLight from above · VOXEL_GLOW_SOFT · I=0.4 · no shadow
selective on building emissives only · threshold 0.6
no DoF (cost) · slight chromatic aberration on bloom (≤0.4)
Camera at (0, 20, 35) looking at (0, 0, 0) · FOV 35° · subtle drift baseline
Hover anywhere on screen pans camera within bounds [-15..+15 x, -10..+10 z] at altitude y=20
Pan response is gentle (lerp 200ms) · cursor near edges drifts faster
District zoom (click empty area of district label)
Camera glides to district zoom position · 2.5s ease-camera curve
Altitude drops to y=8 · individual buildings now hover-targetable
"back to overview" affordance bottom-left appears once zoom completes
Camera nudges to building's elevation · ProjectPanel slides in from right
Uses same panel component as Phase 1B Monitor 1 click · content from build-time GitHub fetch
3s glide: window pixel-space transition → city overview camera
During glide: city emissives lift from "seen through glass" to "full" emissive · sky reveals
1.2s fade-in to city overview · no camera move · sky already at session-color
OG image = render of city overview · render once during build, commit to /og-city.png
"back to desk" bottom-left · 2.5s reverse glide camera through window plane
On deep-link load, "back to desk" still works — navigates to / and replays the desk wake-up
prefers-reduced-motion: all glides → 400ms crossfade · pan disabled · static camera at overview

svg.text: v1 · for Claude Code Phase 3 · companion to lighting-plan.svg · the voxel grammar is the same throughout (block size, lighting model) — silhouettes distinguish
